meaning: adj.形式的,样式的,形态上的,情态的,语气的adj.[计](对话框等)模式的
examples: At the same time, greater efforts must be made to achieve a modal shift.
Creating a new modal dialog box.
City officials took notice and are beginning to change zoning rules while promoting multi-modal transportation facilities on the streetscape.
They settled on a cotton-modal blend (modal is a form of rayon) that offered a soft feel, attractive drape and absorbed color well.
